reviews.author: priya seshan
reviews.review_body: It has been four years since our family relocated from abroad and enrolled our children at Pallikkoodam. From the very beginning, the school's friendly and welcoming environment made our children feel at ease, and they quickly adapted to their new surroundings. This journey has been nothing short of wonderful. Over the years, we have witnessed the school's commitment not only to academic excellence but also to providing students with opportunities to express their learning in creative and meaningful ways. Our children have thrived in an atmosphere where they learn joyfully, without pressure, and where the innovative methods used to impart the curriculum ensure that their learning is both lasting and deeply engaging.

reviews.author: Shanmuga Priya
reviews.review_body:
As a parent, I am completely satisfied with the experience at Raks.This is 4th year for my son and he enjoys coming to school everyday.The child friendly environment for kids at RAKS, the encouragement to involve the parent community, the various platforms given to the children to have experiential learning - a special mention of the STUDENT LED CONFERENCE by the school.It was amazing to see how kids from Grade 1 and above get to showcase their learning in the most confident and fun way.

Recently, the Year End Programme was remarkable to see our kids to revisit all our old English classics.This shows the versatility of the school in all areas.Iam happy with how school is shaping my son.

Iam a proud RAKS parent.

reviews.author: Sindhiya Gunasegaran
reviews.review_body: We clearly said we need admission for IGCSE the admission staff called us and confirmed the board of study that time also I said IGCSE. After going there the staff is saying very lethargic way no admissions are opened up for IGCSE as of now it's all over by October. She could said this before itself we would not wasted our time travelling to their campus. She is saying you could opt for CBSE. Who the hell is she to make us put in other board. If you have no openings for IGCSE you could have informed this earlier so that we would have planned accordingly. Who are you to say put your kid in CBSE? DID I CAME FOR THAT? On doubt only we asked for cambridge books. 1000 rs scam in a simple way. Thank God for showing their darker side.

reviews.author: Karthik
reviews.review_body:
Worst admission staff ever. Getting Admission fee for Igsce and on going there the staff is saying no openings for igcse. They could have said this before itself. No campus visit was allowed. Staff was not ready to explain anything.  Also for the next time we come for admission we have to pay another 1000rs. They are mainly concentrate to get admission to CBSE.
Worst management. Belive me we enquire about the education system in pallikoodam not up to  the mark in  IGCSE.
Because they scare to share the Cambridge assessment and how they Teaching methods in IGCSE.
They only focusing to get filling seat in CBSE

reviews.author: Vimala Ramasamy
reviews.review_body: A lovely year end program. It went seamlessly without a hitch. From the rendering of the prayer song which was very unique to the chity chity bang bang musical, loved every bit of it. All the songs reminded me of my school days

reviews.author: Lakshmi Prabha
reviews.review_body: Well equipped teachers n their techniques

reviews.author: Sabitha Prem
reviews.review_body: Great event, very well thought through and well organised

reviews.author: Anju Ganesh
reviews.review_body: The Year End Programme was a very professional and amazing set of performances from the children which was beyond expectations. Kudos to the teachers and training team for each of the performance, making it into such a memorable evening. Well done Raks 👍🏼

reviews.author: sakthiniveditha sakthi
reviews.review_body: Very well done ….. kids are amazing
